value.found_quote: Claude Fable 5 (claude-fable-5) is Anthropic's most capable widely released model.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Claude Fable 5 as Anthropic's most capable widely released model, with API IDs, pricing, and a general availability date of June 9, 2026. It states "Claude Fable 5 is generally available on the Claude API... beginning June 9, 2026," indicating active/GA status.
